title: BEM-652 auditor mailbox plan
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
mailbox=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor'); mailbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
internal_inbox=Path('governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox'); internal_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
plans=Path('governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans'); plans.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
controls=Path('governance/internal_contour/controls'); controls.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

bem='BEM-652'
plan_id='bem652_internal_contour_full_readiness_plan'

plan={
 'schema_version':'internal_contour_full_readiness_plan.v1',
 'bem':bem,
 'plan_id':plan_id,
 'source':'external_auditor_request_to_internal_auditor',
 'status':'ready_for_internal_auditor_review',
 'goal':'Bring internal development contour to full operational readiness, including reliable hourly Telegram reports and auditor sync.',
 'operator_problem':'Hourly Telegram reports are still not arriving. Internal contour works as file-based governed contour, but needs runtime hardening and full proof loops.',
 'principles':['Do not use audit_mailbox as general role-bus. Use it only for external auditor to internal auditor sync and reverse direction.','Internal tasks still use internal_contour role-bus.','Claude primary can be selected only with runtime proof; otherwise reserve route is valid and explicit.','Telegram hourly report is not production-ready until delivery_confirmed=true.','No PASS without evidence.'],
 'workstreams':[
   {'id':'W1','name':'Telegram hourly delivery repair','objective':'Make curator-hourly-report.yml actually deliver hourly reports and persist delivery proof.','tasks':['Verify TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID presence without printing secrets','Check workflow triggers: schedule and manual dispatch','Record HTTP status and Telegram API response safely','Persist governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json with telegram_delivery=sent or exact blocker','Run delivery verifier until delivery_confirmed=true'],'acceptance':['curator_hourly_report_state.telegram_delivery == sent','curator_hourly_delivery_verification.delivery_confirmed == true','Operator receives canonical hourly report in Telegram']},
   {'id':'W2','name':'Claude primary runtime proof','objective':'If Claude is currently available, prove it with Claude-authored runtime artifact and select primary where appropriate.','tasks':['Run Claude runtime smoke','Persist claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json','If claude_runtime_proven=true, update provider route to primary_proven','If not, keep reserve route with reason'],'acceptance':['Claude primary selected only if runtime proof exists','Provider route states selected_provider and reserve_used clearly']},
   {'id':'W3','name':'Internal auditor sync','objective':'Use audit_mailbox only for external auditor ↔ internal auditor agreement on roadmap and readiness.','tasks':['External auditor sends this plan to audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor','Internal auditor responds through audit_mailbox/internal_auditor_to_external_auditor','Internal auditor creates final verdict in internal_contour/auditor/reports'],'acceptance':['Mailbox contains both request and response','Internal auditor verdict exists']},
   {'id':'W4','name':'Role-bus execution hardening','objective':'Ensure every future task has curator, orchestrator, analyst, internal auditor, executor, selftest, final report artifacts.','tasks':['Run internal_contour_architecture_lint','Add missing router if mailbox response is not automatically imported to internal auditor inbox','Ensure final reports show execution_type and provider proof'],'acceptance':['architecture lint pass','each role artifact present','execution_type field present in reports']},
   {'id':'W5','name':'Final readiness acceptance','objective':'Close development only after all required checks and operational watches are resolved or explicitly classified.','tasks':['Run controls C1-C7 plus Telegram delivery C8','Create final readiness report','Mark blockers null only with evidence'],'acceptance':['Final readiness status production_ready or production_ready_with_named_watch','No hidden blockers']}
 ],
 'required_controls':['C1 write-channel smoke pass','C2 architecture lint pass','C3 mailbox boundary pass','C4 provider route closure pass','C5 Claude runtime proof or explicit reserve route pass','C6 Telegram delivery confirmed','C7 internal auditor verdict exists','C8 final operator-readable report exists'],
 'questions_for_internal_auditor':['Do you approve this workstream split W1-W5?','Should Telegram delivery C6 be hard blocker for production readiness? Recommended: yes for hourly-report readiness.','If Claude runtime proof passes, should internal auditor/executor primary provider switch from reserve to Claude primary for next real implementation?','Do you require any additional checks before final readiness acceptance?'],
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}
plan_file=plans/(plan_id+'.json')
plan_md=plans/(plan_id+'.md')
plan_file.write_text(json.dumps(plan,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
plan_md.write_text('# BEM-652 | Internal Contour Full Readiness Plan'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Goal'+sep+plan['goal']+sep+sep+'## Operator problem'+sep+plan['operator_problem']+sep+sep+'## Workstreams'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+w['id']+' | '+w['name']+' | '+w['objective'] for w in plan['workstreams']])+sep+sep+'## Questions for internal auditor'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+q for q in plan['questions_for_internal_auditor']])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)

mail=mailbox/'bem652_full_readiness_plan_request.md'
mail.write_text('# EXTERNAL AUDITOR TO INTERNAL AUDITOR | BEM-652 | FULL READINESS PLAN REVIEW'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)'+sep+'From: External Auditor / GPT'+sep+'To: Internal Auditor'+sep+'Channel: governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor/'+sep+'Status: REQUEST_REVIEW'+sep+sep+'## Context'+sep+'Operator confirmed that internal contour works, but needs completion/hardening. Critical issue: hourly Telegram reports are still not arriving. Claude is reported by operator as available now, so provider runtime proof must be rechecked.'+sep+sep+'## Request'+sep+'Review and agree the further development plan for internal contour to full readiness. Pay special attention to Telegram hourly delivery and Claude primary runtime proof.'+sep+sep+'## Plan summary'+sep+'W1 Telegram hourly delivery repair — hard requirement until delivery_confirmed=true.'+sep+'W2 Claude primary runtime proof — if available, prove it and update provider route.'+sep+'W3 Auditor sync — use audit_mailbox only for external↔internal auditor communication.'+sep+'W4 Role-bus execution hardening — every task must pass curator/orchestrator/analyst/auditor/executor/selftest/report chain.'+sep+'W5 Final readiness acceptance — production_ready only with evidence.'+sep+sep+'## Questions'+sep+sep+sep.join([str(i+1)+'. '+q for i,q in enumerate(plan['questions_for_internal_auditor'])])+sep+sep+'## Required response path'+sep+'Please answer in `governance/audit_mailbox/internal_auditor_to_external_auditor/bem652_full_readiness_plan_response.md` and create internal verdict in `governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/`.'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)

# Also create internal auditor inbox package so the internal contour can pick it up as an audit task, while mailbox remains the external-internal auditor sync channel.
inbox_pkg={
 'schema_version':'internal_auditor_mailbox_intake.v1',
 'bem':bem,
 'package_id':'bem652_mailbox_request_intake_for_internal_auditor',
 'source_mailbox_file':str(mail),
 'source_plan':str(plan_file),
 'from_role':'external_auditor',
 'to_role':'internal_auditor',
 'transport':'audit_mailbox_external_to_internal',
 'status':'ready_for_internal_auditor_review',
 'required_output':['mailbox response to internal_auditor_to_external_auditor','internal auditor verdict report','approved/revised execution plan'],
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}
inbox_file=internal_inbox/'bem652_mailbox_request_intake_for_internal_auditor.json'
inbox_file.write_text(json.dumps(inbox_pkg,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

control={
 'schema_version':'bem652_controls.v1',
 'bem':bem,
 'status':'ready',
 'controls':[
   {'id':'C6','name':'telegram_delivery_confirmed','hard_blocker':True,'evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json'},
   {'id':'C9','name':'auditor_mailbox_response','hard_blocker':True,'evidence':'governance/audit_mailbox/internal_auditor_to_external_auditor/bem652_full_readiness_plan_response.md'},
   {'id':'C10','name':'internal_auditor_verdict','hard_blocker':True,'evidence':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem652_full_readiness_plan_verdict.json'}
 ],
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)'
}
control_file=controls/'bem652_full_readiness_controls.json'
control_file.write_text(json.dumps(control,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

protocol=protocols/'FULL_READINESS_DEVELOPMENT_PLAN.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-652 | Full Readiness Development Plan'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Further development of the internal contour is split into W1-W5. Telegram hourly delivery confirmation is a hard readiness requirement. Claude primary runtime proof must be rerun because operator states Claude is currently available.'+sep)

state={'schema_version':'auditor_mailbox_completion_plan_state.v1','bem':bem,'status':'sent_to_internal_auditor_via_audit_mailbox','plan_file':str(plan_file),'mailbox_file':str(mail),'internal_inbox_file':str(inbox_file),'controls':str(control_file),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem652_auditor_mailbox_completion_plan.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem652_auditor_mailbox_completion_plan.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-652 | Auditor Mailbox Completion Plan | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Full readiness plan sent to internal auditor through audit_mailbox external_to_internal lane, with internal inbox intake package and controls.'+sep+sep+'## Files'+sep+'- '+str(plan_file)+sep+'- '+str(mail)+sep+'- '+str(inbox_file)+sep+'- '+str(control_file)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem652_auditor_mailbox_completion_plan','cycle_id':'bem652-auditor-mailbox-completion-plan','source':'external_auditor_gpt','status':'sent_to_internal_auditor_via_audit_mailbox','plan_file':str(plan_file),'mailbox_file':str(mail),'internal_inbox_file':str(inbox_file),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem652_auditor_mailbox_completion_plan']={'status':'sent_to_internal_auditor_via_audit_mailbox','plan_file':str(plan_file),'mailbox_file':str(mail),'internal_inbox_file':str(inbox_file),'blocker':None}
contour_state['full_readiness_plan_status']='internal_auditor_review_requested'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:36 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem652_auditor_mailbox_completion_plan.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-652 PASS: full readiness plan sent to internal auditor via audit_mailbox external_to_internal lane.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(plan_file),str(plan_md),str(mail),str(inbox_file),str(control_file),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Prepared full readiness plan and sent it to internal auditor through audit_mailbox external_to_internal lane with internal inbox intake and controls')
